s1.speaker: ferris
s1.line: Ah. The press. Ferris Mott has a request, reporter. Read it to me. Your page. Out loud, if you would.

s3.speaker: narrator
s3.line: Ferris nods, slowly, the way a man nods at weather he predicted. He isn't angry. That's worse.

s4.speaker: ferris
s4.line: Red-pawed. Yes. Ferris Mott held the shovel; the words hold longer. Well. You know where the witness is, when the paper wants him again.

g1.speaker: ferris
g1.line: The reporter returns! Ferris Mott is composing a formal apology to a marrow. It is proving difficult. The marrow gave so much, and Ferris Mott took... well. The marrow.
